summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BioLens 4 new features: Purchase Impact Layer with estimated metrics, GS1-ready barcode lookup with provider abstraction, Search autocomplete from Supabase, and PWA install capability. All features working correctly with one minor autocomplete interaction issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking on autocomplete suggestions blocked by overlay interception
ui_bugs.workaround: Keyboard navigation (arrow keys + enter) works correctly, manual typing + enter also works

passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (200 OK)
Backend search for 'polyester hoodie' → Petro-Based classification with search_biolens_scan_enriched()
Backend search for 'bamboo sheets' → Transition Material classification
Backend barcode lookup with GS1-ready fields (title, brand, description, source)
Backend barcode provider abstraction using BARCODE_PROVIDER=upcitemdb
Frontend homepage loading with hero section, search bar, scan button
Purchase Impact section renders for 'polyester hoodie' with Est. Petro Cost, Jobs Multiplier, Carbon Proxy, Microplastic Shedding
Purchase Impact section renders for plant-based 'hemp shirt' with no microplastic stat and appropriate messaging
Purchase Impact section has 'Material-level estimates' disclaimer label
Autocomplete typing 'poly' shows dropdown with material names and aliases from Supabase
Autocomplete keyboard navigation (up/down arrows, enter to select, escape to close) works
Autocomplete does not break manual search (typing full query and pressing enter still works)
PWA manifest.json accessible at /manifest.json with correct structure
PWA service worker sw.js accessible at /sw.js and properly registered
PWA manifest linked in HTML head
Homepage loads with hero, search bar, Scan Product button
Results page shows Petroload meter, confidence badge, share button
Example search chips navigation works (pet bottle chip tested)
Explainer cards section with Material Check, Why It Matters, Better Alternatives
CTA section with How it Works scroll and Explore Materials button
No body-stream or double-read response errors in console
No critical JavaScript console errors detected
Scan history functionality (empty state handled correctly)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix autocomplete suggestion clicking - overlay interception prevents clicking on dropdown suggestions. Consider using force=true for clicks or adjusting z-index/overlay handling.
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (14/14 tests), Frontend: 95% (22/23 features working, 1 minor autocomplete interaction issue)
